lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗੜੁ ਕੋਟੁ ਹੈ ਸਭਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰ ਦੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa andar garr kott hai sabh disantar desaa |
lines.english: Deep within the body is the fortress of the Lord, and all lands and countries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈਅਨੁ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਪਰਵੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape taarree laaeean sabh meh paravesaa |
lines.english: He Himself sits in primal, profound Samaadhi; He Himself is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਰਖੇਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt saajeean aap gupat rakhesaa |
lines.english: He Himself created the Universe, and He Himself remains hidden within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਪਰਗਟੀਏਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te jaaniaa sach paragatteesaa |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, the Lord is known, and the Truth is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh sacho sach hai gur sojhee paaee |16|
lines.english: He is True, the Truest of the True; the Guru has imparted this understanding. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਅਹਾੜੁ ਦਿਹੁ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਦੁਇ ਖੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: saavan raat ahaarr dihu kaam krodh due khet |
lines.english: Night is the summer season, and day is the winter season; sexual desire and anger are the two fields planted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਮਣ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਖਟੇ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hal beechaar vikaar man hukamee khatte khaae |
lines.english: Contemplation is the plow, and corruption is the harvest; this is what one earns and eats, according to the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਵਤ੍ਰ ਦਰੋਗੁ ਬੀਉ ਹਾਲੀ ਰਾਹਕੁ ਹੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: lab vatr darog beeo haalee raahak het |
lines.english: Greed prepares the soil, and the seed of falsehood is planted; attachment and love are the farmer and hired hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਭੁਇ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਬਲੇਦ ॥
lines.translit: bhau bhue pavit paanee sat santokh baled |
lines.english: Make the Fear of God the farm, purity the water, truth and contentment the cows and bulls,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਖੈ ਮੰਗਿਐ ਅਉਤੁ ਜਣੇਦਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak lekhai mangiai aaut janedaa jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, when one is called to give his account, he will be barren and infertile. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਬੀਜੁ ਬਖਸੀਸ ਬੋਹਲ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਸਗਲ ਦਰੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: naau beej bakhasees bohal duneea sagal darog |
lines.english: Let the Lord's Name be the seed, and His Forgiving Grace the harvest. Do this, and the whole world will seem false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲੁ ਹਲੇਮੀ ਹਾਲੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਚੇਤਾ ਵਤ੍ਰ ਵਖਤ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: hal halemee haalee chit chetaa vatr vakhat sanjog |
lines.english: humility the plow, consciousness the plowman, remembrance the preparation of the soil, and union with the Lord the planting time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mohu gubaar hai doojai bhaae bolai |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is trapped in the darkness of emotional attachment; in the love of duality he speaks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਵਿਜੋਗ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree karam hoe jaaveh sagal vijog |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, if He bestows His Merciful Glance of Grace, then all your separation will be ended. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਲਧਾ ਟੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar paragaas ghatt chaananaa har ladhaa ttolai |
lines.english: The Divine Light illuminates his heart deep within; he seeks the Lord, and obtains Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਨੀਰੁ ਵਿਰੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae sadaa dukh hai nit neer virolai |
lines.english: The love of duality brings pain forever; he churns the water endlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਥਿ ਤਤੁ ਕਢੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam dhiaaeeai math tat kadtolai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; he churns, and obtains the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਦਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: aape bharam bhulaaeidaa kichh kehan na jaaee |17|
lines.english: He Himself deludes in doubt; no one can comment on this. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਭਿ ਰੋਜੀ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jal meh jant upaaeian tinaa bhi rojee dee |
lines.english: He created the creatures in water, and He gives them their nourishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਹਟੁ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਕਿਰਸ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: othai hatt na chalee naa ko kiras karee |
lines.english: There are no stores open there, and no one farms there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਹੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak chintaa mat karahu chintaa tis hee hee |
lines.english: O Nanak, don't be anxious; the Lord will take care of you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਉਦਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾ ਕੋ ਲਏ ਨ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: saudaa mool na hovee naa ko le na dee |
lines.english: No business is ever transacted there, and no one buys or sells.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਆਹਾਰੁ ਜੀਅ ਖਾਣਾ ਏਹੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kaa aahaar jeea khaanaa ehu karee |
lines.english: Animals eat other animals; this is what the Lord has given them as food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮਤ ਕਰਹੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਹੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak chintaa mat karahu chintaa tis hee hee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, don't be anxious; the Lord will take care of you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਸਾਇਰਾ ਤਿਨਾ ਭਿ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: vich upaae saaeiraa tinaa bhi saar karee |
lines.english: He created them in the oceans, and He provides for them as well.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਝੀਵਰੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu jeeo machhulee jheevar trisanaa kaal |
lines.english: O Nanak, this soul is the fish, and death is the hungry fisherman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਅੰਧੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਈ ਪੜੈ ਅਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: manooaa andh na chetee parrai achintaa jaal |
lines.english: The blind man does not even think of this. And suddenly, the net is cast.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nadar kare je aapanee taa aape le milaae |2|
lines.english: But if the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, then He unites the soul with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਿਤੁ ਅਚੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਬਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak chit achet hai chintaa badhaa jaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, his consciousness is unconscious, and he departs, bound by anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਉਦਾ ਕੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sachaa man vasai sach saudaa keetaa |
lines.english: The True Lord abides in the mind of the Gurmukh; He strikes the true bargain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: se jan saache sadaa sadaa jinee har ras peetaa |
lines.english: They are true, forever true, who drink in the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਰਿ ਗਈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar trisanaa mar gee har gun gaaveetaa |
lines.english: The hunger within is conquered and overcome, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaaeian aape dee bujhaaee |18|
lines.english: He Himself unites in His Union; He Himself blesses them with understanding. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਹੈ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਲੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh ghar hee maeh hai vaddabhaagee leetaa |
lines.english: Everything is in the home of the self within; only the very fortunate obtain it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਲਿ ਪਿੰਞਾਇਆ ਕਤਿ ਵੁਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vel pinyaaeaa kat vunaaeaa |
lines.english: The cotton is ginned, woven and spun;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਟਿ ਕੁਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਖੁੰਬਿ ਚੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: katt kutt kar khunb charraaeaa |
lines.english: the cloth is laid out, washed and bleached white.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਉ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਟੀ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਸੀਪੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵਤ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eiau pat paattee sifatee seepai naanak jeevat jeevai |
lines.english: Thus, the torn and tattered honor is sewn up again, through the Lord's Praise, O Nanak, and one lives the true life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹਾ ਵਢੇ ਦਰਜੀ ਪਾੜੇ ਸੂਈ ਧਾਗਾ ਸੀਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: lohaa vadte darajee paarre sooee dhaagaa seevai |
lines.english: The tailor cuts it with his scissors, and sews it with his thread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਹੁ ਪਖੁ ਕਿਹੁ ਚਲੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੰਢੈ ॥
lines.translit: maahu pakh kihu chalai naahee gharree muhat kichh handtai |
lines.english: It will not last for a month, or even a week. It barely lasts for an hour, or even a moment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਕਪੜੁ ਪਾਟੈ ਸੂਈ ਧਾਗਾ ਗੰਢੈ ॥
lines.translit: hoe puraanaa kaparr paattai sooee dhaagaa gandtai |
lines.english: Becoming worn, the cloth is torn; with needle and thread it is sewn up again.
